Operation 'updateSite' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too narrow (only mentions domain) and lacks critical details. Added context about what can be updated, authentication requirements, partial update support, return value, and access control for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Updates a site's domain.
data.description_suggestion: Updates a site's configuration including domain name. Requires authentication with a valid API key. Accepts partial updates via the UpdateSiteRequest schema. Returns the updated Site object with all current configuration details. Only the authenticated user's sites can be modified.
data.reasoning: Original description is too narrow (only mentions domain) and lacks critical details. Added context about what can be updated, authentication requirements, partial update support, return value, and access control for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'deleteSite' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary and description lack specificity about scope and consequences. Added clarity about what gets deleted (analytics data, shared links, goals), authentication requirements, irreversibility warning, and access control to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.

data.current_description: Deletes a site and all associated data.
data.summary_suggestion: Delete a site and all analytics data
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a site and all associated analytics data, shared links, and goals. Requires authentication with a valid API key. This action is irreversible. Returns a 200 status on successful deletion. Only the authenticated user's sites can be deleted.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity about scope and consequences. Added clarity about what gets deleted (analytics data, shared links, goals), authentication requirements, irreversibility warning, and access control to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.

message: Operation 'createSharedLink' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too generic and doesn't explain the purpose or access model of shared links. Added context about read-only access, authentication requirements, input/output details, and use case to help AI agents understand when and why to use this operation.

data.current_description: Creates a shared link for a site.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a shared analytics dashboard link
data.description_suggestion: Creates a shared link that provides read-only access to a site's analytics dashboard. Requires authentication with a valid API key. Accepts site ID and optional configuration via CreateSharedLinkRequest schema. Returns a SharedLink object containing the generated link URL and access details. Shared links allow external stakeholders to view analytics without requiring a Plausible account.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and doesn't explain the purpose or access model of shared links. Added context about read-only access, authentication requirements, input/output details, and use case to help AI agents understand when and why to use this operation.

message: Operation 'createGoal' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description mentions goal types but lacks input/output details and context about purpose. Added clarity about what goals measure, how they work, authentication requirements, and what the operation returns to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Creates a goal for a site. Goals can be page visit goals or custom event goals.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a conversion tracking goal for a site to measure specific user actions. Supports two goal types: page visit goals (track visits to specific URLs) and custom event goals (track named events sent via the tracking API). Requires authentication with a valid API key. Accepts goal configuration via CreateGoalRequest schema. Returns a Goal object with the created goal's ID, name, type, and configuration details.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions goal types but lacks input/output details and context about purpose. Added clarity about what goals measure, how they work, authentication requirements, and what the operation returns to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'deleteGoal' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks specificity about parameters, effects, and consequences. Added clarity about goal ID requirement, authentication, irreversibility, impact on tracking, and data retention to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and side effects.

data.current_description: Deletes a goal from a site.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a conversion tracking goal from a site. Requires authentication with a valid API key and the goal ID as a path parameter. This action is irreversible and will stop tracking the associated conversion metric. Returns a 200 status on successful deletion. Historical goal data is retained but the goal will no longer be active.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about parameters, effects, and consequences. Added clarity about goal ID requirement, authentication, irreversibility, impact on tracking, and data retention to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and side effects.

message: Operation 'getAggregateStats' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Get aggregate stats' is too generic. Description references dashboard UI which is not helpful for AI agents. Improved version specifies what metrics are available, clarifies that multiple metrics can be combined, and explicitly mentions required parameters and response type for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Aggregates metrics over a certain time period. If you are familiar with the Plausible dashboard, this endpoint corresponds to the top row of stats that includes unique visitors, pageviews, bounce rate, and visit duration. You can retrieve any number and combination of these metrics in one request.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve aggregated website metrics over time period
data.description_suggestion: Aggregates website metrics over a specified time period. Returns combined metrics such as unique visitors, pageviews, bounce rate, and visit duration. Supports querying any combination of available metrics in a single request. Requires site_id and date range parameters. Returns an AggregateResponse object containing the requested metrics.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Get aggregate stats' is too generic. Description references dashboard UI which is not helpful for AI agents. Improved version specifies what metrics are available, clarifies that multiple metrics can be combined, and explicitly mentions required parameters and response type for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getTimeseries' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is vague and doesn't indicate the time-series nature clearly. Description lacks specificity about parameters and response format. Improved version clarifies the granularity (daily), specifies required parameters, provides example metrics, and explicitly mentions the response schema for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description: Returns a time series of data over a given time period. Each data point contains the metrics for that date.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve time-series metrics for specified date range
data.description_suggestion: Returns time-series data showing metrics for each date within a specified time period. Each data point represents a single date with its associated metrics (e.g., visitors, pageviews). Requires site_id, date range, and metric parameters. Returns a TimeseriesResponse object containing an array of daily metric data points.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague and doesn't indicate the time-series nature clearly. Description lacks specificity about parameters and response format. Improved version clarifies the granularity (daily), specifies required parameters, provides example metrics, and explicitly mentions the response schema for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'getBreakdown' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary lacks clarity about what 'breakdown' means in analytics context. Description uses informal language ('Think of it as') unsuitable for AI agents. Improved version specifies common dimension examples, clarifies ordering/filtering capabilities, explicitly lists required parameters, and references the response schema.

data.current_description: Returns a breakdown of stats by the specified property. Think of it as a filtered, ordered list of items with their associated metrics.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve metrics broken down by specified dimension
data.description_suggestion: Returns metrics broken down by a specified dimension (property) such as country, browser, page, or referrer. Results are ordered and can be filtered. Each item in the breakdown includes the dimension value and its associated metrics. Requires site_id, metric, and property parameters. Returns a BreakdownResponse object containing a list of dimension values with their metrics.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks clarity about what 'breakdown' means in analytics context. Description uses informal language ('Think of it as') unsuitable for AI agents. Improved version specifies common dimension examples, clarifies ordering/filtering capabilities, explicitly lists required parameters, and references the response schema.

message: Operation 'createSite' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate but description lacks critical details. Missing information about required input fields (domain, name), response structure (Site object with site_id), and side effects (site becomes available for tracking). Improved description provides complete context for AI agents to understand inputs, outputs, and state changes.

data.current_description: Creates a new site in your Plausible account.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new site in the authenticated user's Plausible account. Requires a CreateSiteRequest with site domain and name. Returns a Site object containing the newly created site's details including site_id. The site becomes immediately available for tracking analytics data.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks critical details. Missing information about required input fields (domain, name), response structure (Site object with site_id), and side effects (site becomes available for tracking). Improved description provides complete context for AI agents to understand inputs, outputs, and state changes.

data.current_description: Returns details of a specific site.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific site by site_id. Returns a Site object containing the site's configuration, domain, and metadata. Requires the authenticated user to have access to the specified site.
data.reasoning: Summary is acceptable but description is too vague. Missing specification of the required site_id parameter, response schema details, and access control context. Operation 'updateSite' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too narrow (only mentions domain) and lacks critical details. Added context about what can be updated, authentication requirements, partial update support, return value, and access control for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Updates a site's domain.
data.description_suggestion: Updates a site's configuration including domain name. Requires authentication with a valid API key. Accepts partial updates via the UpdateSiteRequest schema. Returns the updated Site object with all current configuration details. Only the authenticated user's sites can be modified.
data.reasoning: Original description is too narrow (only mentions domain) and lacks critical details. Added context about what can be updated, authentication requirements, partial update support, return value, and access control for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'deleteSite' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary and description lack specificity about scope and consequences. Added clarity about what gets deleted (analytics data, shared links, goals), authentication requirements, irreversibility warning, and access control to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.

data.current_description: Deletes a site and all associated data.
data.summary_suggestion: Delete a site and all analytics data
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a site and all associated analytics data, shared links, and goals. Requires authentication with a valid API key. This action is irreversible. Returns a 200 status on successful deletion. Only the authenticated user's sites can be deleted.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity about scope and consequences. Added clarity about what gets deleted (analytics data, shared links, goals), authentication requirements, irreversibility warning, and access control to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.

message: Operation 'createSharedLink' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too generic and doesn't explain the purpose or access model of shared links. Added context about read-only access, authentication requirements, input/output details, and use case to help AI agents understand when and why to use this operation.

data.current_description: Creates a shared link for a site.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a shared analytics dashboard link
data.description_suggestion: Creates a shared link that provides read-only access to a site's analytics dashboard. Requires authentication with a valid API key. Accepts site ID and optional configuration via CreateSharedLinkRequest schema. Returns a SharedLink object containing the generated link URL and access details. Shared links allow external stakeholders to view analytics without requiring a Plausible account.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and doesn't explain the purpose or access model of shared links. Added context about read-only access, authentication requirements, input/output details, and use case to help AI agents understand when and why to use this operation.

message: Operation 'createGoal' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description mentions goal types but lacks input/output details and context about purpose. Added clarity about what goals measure, how they work, authentication requirements, and what the operation returns to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Creates a goal for a site. Goals can be page visit goals or custom event goals.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a conversion tracking goal for a site to measure specific user actions. Supports two goal types: page visit goals (track visits to specific URLs) and custom event goals (track named events sent via the tracking API). Requires authentication with a valid API key. Accepts goal configuration via CreateGoalRequest schema. Returns a Goal object with the created goal's ID, name, type, and configuration details.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions goal types but lacks input/output details and context about purpose. Added clarity about what goals measure, how they work, authentication requirements, and what the operation returns to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'deleteGoal' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks specificity about parameters, effects, and consequences. Added clarity about goal ID requirement, authentication, irreversibility, impact on tracking, and data retention to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and side effects.

data.current_description: Deletes a goal from a site.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a conversion tracking goal from a site. Requires authentication with a valid API key and the goal ID as a path parameter. This action is irreversible and will stop tracking the associated conversion metric. Returns a 200 status on successful deletion. Historical goal data is retained but the goal will no longer be active.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about parameters, effects, and consequences. Added clarity about goal ID requirement, authentication, irreversibility, impact on tracking, and data retention to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and side effects.

message: Operation 'getAggregateStats' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Get aggregate stats' is too generic. Description references dashboard UI which is not helpful for AI agents. Improved version specifies what metrics are available, clarifies that multiple metrics can be combined, and explicitly mentions required parameters and response type for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Aggregates metrics over a certain time period. If you are familiar with the Plausible dashboard, this endpoint corresponds to the top row of stats that includes unique visitors, pageviews, bounce rate, and visit duration. You can retrieve any number and combination of these metrics in one request.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve aggregated website metrics over time period
data.description_suggestion: Aggregates website metrics over a specified time period. Returns combined metrics such as unique visitors, pageviews, bounce rate, and visit duration. Supports querying any combination of available metrics in a single request. Requires site_id and date range parameters. Returns an AggregateResponse object containing the requested metrics.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Get aggregate stats' is too generic. Description references dashboard UI which is not helpful for AI agents. Improved version specifies what metrics are available, clarifies that multiple metrics can be combined, and explicitly mentions required parameters and response type for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getTimeseries' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is vague and doesn't indicate the time-series nature clearly. Description lacks specificity about parameters and response format. Improved version clarifies the granularity (daily), specifies required parameters, provides example metrics, and explicitly mentions the response schema for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description: Returns a time series of data over a given time period. Each data point contains the metrics for that date.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve time-series metrics for specified date range
data.description_suggestion: Returns time-series data showing metrics for each date within a specified time period. Each data point represents a single date with its associated metrics (e.g., visitors, pageviews). Requires site_id, date range, and metric parameters. Returns a TimeseriesResponse object containing an array of daily metric data points.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague and doesn't indicate the time-series nature clearly. Description lacks specificity about parameters and response format. Improved version clarifies the granularity (daily), specifies required parameters, provides example metrics, and explicitly mentions the response schema for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'getBreakdown' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary lacks clarity about what 'breakdown' means in analytics context. Description uses informal language ('Think of it as') unsuitable for AI agents. Improved version specifies common dimension examples, clarifies ordering/filtering capabilities, explicitly lists required parameters, and references the response schema.

data.current_description: Returns a breakdown of stats by the specified property. Think of it as a filtered, ordered list of items with their associated metrics.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve metrics broken down by specified dimension
data.description_suggestion: Returns metrics broken down by a specified dimension (property) such as country, browser, page, or referrer. Results are ordered and can be filtered. Each item in the breakdown includes the dimension value and its associated metrics. Requires site_id, metric, and property parameters. Returns a BreakdownResponse object containing a list of dimension values with their metrics.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks clarity about what 'breakdown' means in analytics context. Description uses informal language ('Think of it as') unsuitable for AI agents. Improved version specifies common dimension examples, clarifies ordering/filtering capabilities, explicitly lists required parameters, and references the response schema.
